prompt: Create a vertical retro nightlife wallpaper in the style of a candid 1980s/1990s disposable-camera flash photograph, showing three friends crowded together on a plush lounge sofa at night. Two stylish women sit side by side, one in a vivid purple oversized blazer over a shiny black dress with voluminous curly blonde hair, the other in a cobalt blue blazer with short tousled hair, a gold chain necklace, and bold triangular purple earrings; a man in a pale cream suit leans forward with his head resting near their laps, creating an intimate party snapshot composition. Cover all visible faces with exactly 3 soft-edged dusty-rose square censor blocks, one over each person’s face, while keeping hair, clothing, posture, and accessories visible. The setting is a dim upscale bar or rooftop lounge with dark windows, distant city lights, a leafy plant silhouette on the left, and a small table in the foreground holding one cocktail glass with an orange drink, blurred flowers, and reflective glassware. Use soft flash film photography, slight motion blur, dreamy haze, grain, bloom, muted magenta-blue color grading, shallow depth of field, and imperfect vintage exposure. Make it feel like a glamorous private party memory, candid and atmospheric, with no readable text, no watermark, and a 9:16 wallpaper composition.
